root_text.sn26.2:1.2: “Yo kho, bhikkhave, rūpānaṁ uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn26.2:1.7: yo dhammānaṁ uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn26.2:1.8: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpānaṁ nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo.
root_text.sn26.2:1.13: yo dhammānaṁ nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo”ti.

translation_text.sn26.2:1.2: “Mendicants, the arising, continuation, and manifestation and regeneration of sights is the arising of suffering, the continuation of diseases, and the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn26.2:1.3: The arising, continuation, and manifestation and regeneration of sounds,
translation_text.sn26.2:1.7: and ideas is the arising of suffering, the continuation of diseases, and the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn26.2:1.8: The cessation, settling, and disappearance of sights,
translation_text.sn26.2:1.13: and ideas is the cessation of suffering, the settling of diseases, and the disappearance of old age and death.”
